_instructions: To add a new collection, copy one entry below and fill in your details. Images go in /images/[collection-folder]/. Run 'npx vercel deploy' to publish. See HOW-TO-UPDATE.md for full guide.

collections.name: The Flavour Series
collections.subtitle: Orchid earrings named like feelings
collections.subtitle_zh: 以味道命名的蝴蝶兰耳饰
collections.description: Each piece in the Flavour Series is named after a memory of taste and season — dessert-inspired colour stories translated into silk and gold. Every name is a mood. Every colour is a feeling you have had before, somewhere.
collections.description_zh: 味道系列的每一枚耳饰，都以一种味觉记忆命名——将甜蜜与季节的色彩，转化为丝绸与金线。每个名字是一种情绪，每种颜色，是你曾经拥有过的某种感受。

collections.name: Wisteria Dreams
collections.subtitle: For the ones who love softly and deeply
collections.subtitle_zh: 为那些温柔而深情之人
collections.description: Cascading silk wisteria — a flower that blooms in abundance or not at all. The Wisteria collection captures the romantic weight of purple blossoms against spring light, translated into earrings, rings, and brooches that feel like something remembered from a garden you loved.
collections.description_zh: 如瀑布般垂落的紫藤——这种花，要么盛放，要么沉寂。紫藤系列捕捉了春光中紫色花朵的浪漫重量，将它们化为耳饰、戒指与胸针，携带着你曾深爱的某座花园的记忆。

collections.name: Plum in Winter
collections.subtitle: The flower that blooms before spring arrives
collections.subtitle_zh: 在春天来临之前绽放的花
collections.description: The plum blossom is the flower of endurance — it blooms in snow, before anything else dares to. This collection is for people who carry their softness through hard seasons. White and blush silk petals, wire stems, and the quiet insistence of something beautiful that refuses to wait.
collections.description_zh: 梅花是坚韧之花——它在雪中绽放，先于万物。这个系列献给那些在艰难季节中依然温柔的人。白色与淡粉色的丝绸花瓣，金属丝茎，以及美丽之物拒绝等待的宁静执着。

collections.name: Iris Brooch Series
collections.subtitle: A sculpture you can wear
collections.description: Each iris brooch is hand-sculpted from dyed silk wound around gold wire — petals that curve the way real irises do, reaching upward with a quality that photographs cannot fully capture. Available in purple, white, blue, and custom colors. Freshwater pearl included.
collections.description_zh: 每一枚鸢尾胸针，都是用染色丝绸缠绕在金丝上手工雕塑而成——花瓣如真实鸢尾般弯曲，向上伸展，那种质感是照片无法完全捕捉的。提供紫色、白色、蓝色及定制色。配淡水珍珠。

collections.name: White Orchid · Pearl Edition
collections.subtitle: The purest version of the signature piece
collections.description: Pure white silk orchid petals with gold-tone wire and a freshwater baroque pearl drop. The White Orchid is the quietest piece in the collection — and often the one people wear most. It belongs everywhere: at a gallery opening, at a morning coffee, at a wedding where you want to let the bride shine.
collections.description_zh: 纯白色丝绸蝴蝶兰花瓣，配金色金属丝与淡水巴洛克珍珠坠。白兰是系列中最安静的一枚——也往往是人们佩戴最频繁的一枚。它属于一切场合：画廊开幕、清晨咖啡，或是那些你想让新娘成为焦点的婚礼。
collections.tag_zh: 蝴蝶兰 · 珍珠 · 白
